cms.task_text: Naprogramujte želvu tak, aby nakreslila [hlp]přerušovanou čáru ze 4 úseků, každý 30 pixelů[/hlp]. Mezery mezi úseky jsou 15 pixelů. Použijte pero nahoru pro přeskočení každé mezery.
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml:
<xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml">
  <block type="turtle_forward" x="20" y="20">
    <field name="DISTANCE">30</field>
    <next>
      <block type="turtle_pen_up">
        <next>
          <block type="turtle_forward">
            <field name="DISTANCE">15</field>
            <next>
              <block type="turtle_pen_down">
                <next>
                  <block type="turtle_forward">
                    <field name="DISTANCE">30</field>
                    <next>
                      <block type="turtle_pen_up">
                        <next>
                          <block type="turtle_forward">
                            <field name="DISTANCE">15</field>
                            <next>
                              <block type="turtle_pen_down">
                                <next>
                                  <block type="turtle_forward">
                                    <field name="DISTANCE">30</field>
                                    <next>
                                      <block type="turtle_pen_up">
                                        <next>
                                          <block type="turtle_forward">
                                            <field name="DISTANCE">15</field>
                                            <next>
                                              <block type="turtle_pen_down">
                                                <next>
                                                  <block type="turtle_forward">
                                                    <field name="DISTANCE">30</field>
                                                  </block>
                                                </next>
                                              </block>
                                            </next>
                                          </block>
                                        </next>
                                      </block>
                                    </next>
                                  </block>
                                </next>
                              </block>
                            </next>
                          </block>
                        </next>
                      </block>
                    </next>
                  </block>
                </next>
              </block>
            </next>
          </block>
        </next>
      </block>
    </next>
  </block>
</xml>

testing_js.poznamka: Paste do testing.js pro lokální otestování v sandboxu
